activities_projects.title: Market Structure Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Study the types of markets and their organization
steps: Identify different types of markets in your town (retail, wholesale, weekly haat)
Describe how each market is organized
List advantages and disadvantages of each type

activities_projects.title: Price Fluctuation Study
steps: Select 3-5 commonly sold items
Record their prices for a week or two
Identify factors causing changes in price (demand, supply, season)
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand price dynamics in markets

activities_projects.title: Consumer Awareness Survey
steps: Prepare 5 questions on shopping habits and satisfaction
Interview 10-15 people in your locality
Analyze responses and identify common trends
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness about consumers and their choices

activities_projects.title: Market Advertisement Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyze marketing techniques in local markets
steps: Collect advertisements from local shops or online
Observe how products are promoted
Identify target audience and marketing strategies
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand market promotion and advertisement methods

activities_projects.title: Comparison of Local vs Supermarket Markets
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate differences in traditional and modern markets
materials: Visits to markets or online information
steps: Visit a local market and a supermarket
Compare in terms of goods, prices, crowd, and services
Summarize your observations in a table
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand modern vs traditional market features

activities_projects.title: Supply Chain Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Trace the journey of a product from producer to consumer
steps: Select one product (e.g., fruits, grains, or clothes)
Research its journey from production to sale
Draw a flowchart showing the supply chain
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how goods reach markets
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness of flowchart and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Impact of Seasonal Changes on Markets
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how seasons affect availability and prices
steps: Select 3 seasonal products (fruits, vegetables, or clothes)
Record availability and prices in different seasons
Explain the changes using supply and demand principles
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand seasonal effects on markets

activities_projects.title: Interview with a Shopkeeper
steps: Prepare 5-6 questions about business challenges and customer behavior
Interview a shopkeeper in your locality
Summarize key points and learnings
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn market operations from a seller's perspective

activities_projects.title: Digital vs Physical Market Study
steps: Choose 2 items and check prices online and offline
Compare convenience, prices, and services
Write a short analysis of pros and cons
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the impact of digital markets

activities_projects.title: Market Report Presentation
steps: Summarize your observations from activities 1–9
Prepare a short presentation highlighting key findings
Present it in class to peers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical and communication skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Presentation clarity and content quality (10 marks)
